sim-aws-s3-2017.title: S3 Regional API Failure
sim-aws-s3-2017.openingPrompt: A storage region shows broad API failures and dependent services are degrading. You are incident commander and must restore service safely.

canonicalResolution.action: Contain further capacity changes in affected S3 subsystems
canonicalResolution.rationale: Stop additional state drift while impact expands.
canonicalResolution.outcome: No new unintended removals occur; investigation can proceed on stable state.

canonicalResolution.action: Prioritize index subsystem restart and integrity checks
canonicalResolution.rationale: Core object metadata path must be restored before broad API recovery.
canonicalResolution.outcome: GET/LIST/DELETE paths begin partial recovery.

canonicalResolution.action: Recover placement subsystem after index readiness
canonicalResolution.rationale: PUT path depends on placement plus healthy index state.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Object write path returns as placement completes recovery.

canonicalResolution.action: Execute controlled downstream recovery and backlog drain
canonicalResolution.rationale: Dependent services require staged recovery after S3 core restoration.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Regional service health normalizes and cascading impacts clear.

distractors: Scale unrelated edge services before stabilizing storage control paths
Run broad config changes during ongoing restart operations
Force immediate full traffic restoration without subsystem readiness checks

sim-meta-backbone-2021.title: Backbone Disconnection and DNS Reachability Loss
sim-meta-backbone-2021.openingPrompt: Multiple social products are globally unreachable and internal operational tools are degraded. You have limited remote access.

canonicalResolution.action: Confirm backbone control-plane disconnection scope
canonicalResolution.rationale: Determine whether failure is global backbone vs single-region issue.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Global network disconnection pattern is confirmed.

canonicalResolution.action: Dispatch onsite teams for out-of-band recovery operations
canonicalResolution.rationale: Primary management paths are unavailable; physical intervention is required.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Engineers regain the ability to modify network state in facilities.

canonicalResolution.action: Restore backbone connectivity before normal DNS/BGP behavior
canonicalResolution.rationale: Authoritative reachability depends on healthy inter-datacenter paths.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Core network paths return and service endpoints become reachable again.

canonicalResolution.action: Ramp traffic in controlled phases across data centers
canonicalResolution.rationale: Avoid secondary instability from sudden traffic and cache pressure.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Services return with controlled recovery instead of a second crash cycle.

distractors: Focus only on application tier restarts while backbone remains disconnected
Force immediate global DNS re-advertisement without core path validation
Resume full user traffic before internal dependency health checks

sim-fastly-global-2021.title: Edge Error Surge from Config Trigger
sim-fastly-global-2021.openingPrompt: A CDN edge platform starts returning widespread errors within minutes. Customer impact is global.

canonicalResolution.action: Detect and isolate the triggering configuration condition
canonicalResolution.rationale: Rapid narrowing prevents unnecessary broad rollback actions.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Triggering customer config pattern is identified.

canonicalResolution.action: Disable the specific triggering configuration behavior
canonicalResolution.rationale: Immediate mitigation restores service before root fix deploy.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Network recovery begins across affected edge locations.

canonicalResolution.action: Monitor staged restoration to majority healthy status
canonicalResolution.rationale: Verify that mitigation holds under returning traffic.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Most services stabilize and status moves toward resolved.

canonicalResolution.action: Deploy permanent software fix for latent bug
canonicalResolution.rationale: Long-term prevention requires code-level remediation after mitigation.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Trigger class is removed from production behavior.

distractors: Perform full-network restart before isolating trigger conditions
Change customer-facing cache policies globally without evidence
Delay mitigation while waiting for full postmortem certainty

sim-gitlab-db-2017.title: Primary Database Data Loss Emergency
sim-gitlab-db-2017.openingPrompt: Database stress incident escalates into major data path failure after an operator action. Production availability is lost.

canonicalResolution.action: Freeze destructive operations and assess surviving recovery assets
canonicalResolution.rationale: Prevent additional data loss and establish viable restore options.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Recovery plan converges on latest viable snapshot strategy.

canonicalResolution.action: Prepare staged restoration using freshest available LVM snapshot
canonicalResolution.rationale: Minimize loss window compared with older backup alternatives.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Core production data foundation is restored in controlled steps.

canonicalResolution.action: Recover critical supplemental data and reconcile identifiers
canonicalResolution.rationale: Dependent records and sequences must be corrected before reopening traffic.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Database consistency improves and duplicate-ID risks are reduced.

canonicalResolution.action: Gradually re-enable platform services with integrity validation
canonicalResolution.rationale: Controlled ramp-up reduces risk of immediate relapse.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Service returns while validated data state is maintained.

distractors: Re-enable all application traffic before sequence reconciliation
Switch to the oldest backup immediately without evaluating newer snapshots
Parallelize unsafe manual DB edits during active restoration

sim-atlassian-sites-2022.title: Large-Scale Customer Site Deletion Recovery
sim-atlassian-sites-2022.openingPrompt: Support reports widespread customer site disappearance following an internal maintenance script run.

canonicalResolution.action: Correlate support alerts with recent deletion script execution
canonicalResolution.rationale: Fast attribution is needed to stop additional destructive workflow risk.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Deletion script is confirmed as incident trigger.

canonicalResolution.action: Form cross-product incident workstreams and define restoration model
canonicalResolution.rationale: Recovery spans identities, product stores, metadata, and integrations.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Manual and automation streams begin restoration safely.

canonicalResolution.action: Execute restoration batches with validated sequencing
canonicalResolution.rationale: Site re-creation/re-mapping must follow coordinated data dependencies.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Restoration 1 recovers initial customer cohorts.

canonicalResolution.action: Shift to accelerated restoration path with higher parallelism
canonicalResolution.rationale: Scale restoration throughput while preserving data consistency.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Remaining sites recover on accelerated timeline to full restoration.

distractors: Retry the original script with adjusted IDs during active incident
Restore product databases before core site identity state exists
Skip customer validation after automated restoration batches

sim-crowdstrike-windows-2024.title: Endpoint Crash Incident from Content Update
sim-crowdstrike-windows-2024.openingPrompt: After a security content release, many Windows endpoints fail to remain stable. Enterprises report widespread disruption.

canonicalResolution.action: Identify offending content release channel and timestamp window
canonicalResolution.rationale: Precise scoping is required for immediate containment and remediation.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Problematic channel file version is isolated.

canonicalResolution.action: Revert faulty content update in distribution pipeline
canonicalResolution.rationale: Stop further propagation of crash-inducing content.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Newly updating hosts receive known-good content version.

canonicalResolution.action: Prioritize host recovery runbooks for already-impacted systems
canonicalResolution.rationale: Hosts unable to stay online need guided recovery paths.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Organizations begin structured endpoint recovery across fleets.

canonicalResolution.action: Publish validated remediation guidance and recovery tooling
canonicalResolution.rationale: Consistent customer execution reduces prolonged outage risk.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Recovery completion accelerates and incident stabilizes.

distractors: Delay rollback while collecting complete ecosystem impact metrics
Assume non-Windows hosts need identical remediation sequence
Push new detection content before stabilizing reverted channel rollout

sim-gcp-filestore-2022.title: Global Filestore API Throttling
sim-gcp-filestore-2022.openingPrompt: Read-only management APIs for a storage product are failing globally with throttling behavior.

canonicalResolution.action: Verify shared global quota path saturation
canonicalResolution.rationale: Differentiate local service fault from global quota exhaustion.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Global throttling behavior is confirmed across regions.

canonicalResolution.action: Trace and isolate internal request flood source
canonicalResolution.rationale: Mitigation requires reducing upstream overload pressure.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Malfunctioning internal service is identified.

canonicalResolution.action: Pause/limit offending internal traffic
canonicalResolution.rationale: Throttle relief is required for API control-plane recovery.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Throttle pressure drops and API availability improves.

canonicalResolution.action: Validate full read-only API recovery and monitor residual errors
canonicalResolution.rationale: Ensure recovery is global and stable before closure.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Service returns and incident is resolved.

distractors: Scale customer-facing frontends without reducing upstream overload
Retry all blocked API calls globally at once
Defer mitigation until quota redesign plan is finalized

sim-gcp-service-control-2025.title: Service Control Crash Loop and API Disruption
sim-gcp-service-control-2025.openingPrompt: Multiple cloud APIs begin returning elevated errors across regions after a control-plane policy update.

canonicalResolution.action: Correlate failure onset with recent policy propagation event
canonicalResolution.rationale: Global simultaneous errors suggest replicated control metadata trigger.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Policy-triggered failure path in control plane is suspected.

canonicalResolution.action: Identify crashing path in Service Control binaries
canonicalResolution.rationale: Need precise fault location to apply safe disable controls.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Null-pointer crash-loop path is confirmed.

canonicalResolution.action: Activate red-button to disable failing policy-serving path
canonicalResolution.rationale: Fast kill switch limits blast radius while binaries stabilize.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Regional recovery begins, then expands globally.

canonicalResolution.action: Coordinate product-level residual recovery, especially in lagging region
canonicalResolution.rationale: Infrastructure recovery and product recovery complete at different rates.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Residual impact clears and incident closes.

distractors: Redeploy unchanged binaries globally before disabling failing code path
Treat as isolated regional outage and skip global policy rollback checks
Run aggressive restart cycles without herd-protection controls

sim-cloudflare-tokens-2023.title: Service Token Authentication Degradation
sim-cloudflare-tokens-2023.openingPrompt: Authentication-dependent internal services begin failing after a recent control-plane release.

canonicalResolution.action: Identify release-related token metadata corruption pattern
canonicalResolution.rationale: Scope affected auth objects before broad remediation.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Overwritten token-secret metadata is detected on impacted accounts.

canonicalResolution.action: Roll back release and block additional metadata writes
canonicalResolution.rationale: Containment must stop ongoing corruption quickly.
canonicalResolution.outcome: No further token corruption occurs.

canonicalResolution.action: Manually restore critical internal service tokens
canonicalResolution.rationale: Immediate product recovery needs targeted token restoration.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Major affected services recover from immediate auth failures.

canonicalResolution.action: Restore all impacted token records from database backup
canonicalResolution.rationale: Complete data-level restoration is needed for full closure.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Remaining account token integrity is recovered and incident ends.

distractors: Rotate all customer-facing credentials before confirming impact scope
Restart unrelated data-plane services without token restoration
Proceed with release rollout while investigating partial alerts

sim-cloudflare-dnssec-2023.title: Resolver SERVFAIL Increase from Stale Root Zone
sim-cloudflare-dnssec-2023.openingPrompt: Resolver error rates rise with elevated SERVFAIL responses across major locations. DNSSEC validation failures are suspected.

canonicalResolution.action: Confirm stale root-zone dependency and signature-expiry linkage
canonicalResolution.rationale: Need to validate stale-source behavior before mitigation selection.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Outdated root zone and validation failures are confirmed.

canonicalResolution.action: Attempt scoped override to avoid stale-root responses
canonicalResolution.rationale: Initial mitigation path tests whether static serving can be bypassed safely.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Partial mitigation exposes forwarding-path gap.

canonicalResolution.action: Disable problematic root-zone preloading behavior completely
canonicalResolution.rationale: Full stop required when partial override does not propagate correctly.
canonicalResolution.outcome: SERVFAIL rates return toward normal quickly.

canonicalResolution.action: Close incident after validation and add stale-root observability controls
canonicalResolution.rationale: Prevent recurrence through direct stale-data detection and alerting.
canonicalResolution.outcome: Incident closes with follow-up hardening plan in place.

distractors: Treat elevated SERVFAIL as only external-authoritative instability
Restart resolver fleet globally before isolating stale-root path
Modify cache TTL policy without fixing root-zone loading path
